title: [YTP] YOUR SINK IS THE BATHROOM
description:
Because interior design is interior design, obviously.

For some reason I was very entertained by a particular video on faucets.  I knew I had to edit it.  Just incredibly fun material to work with.

...and also, I'm starting to think I have some weird fixation with home improvement-related sources.

Captioned by Sam Kowanetz (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCoPLYl49Nsggl71wAj-z1EA)
Captioned by DigiDuncan (http://www.youtube.com/DigiDuncan)
